title: International Business University (Ottawa campus) - Canada.ca
content:
## International Business University
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Master of Business Administration - Technology, Innovation and Entrepreneurship (TIE)
- Master of Business Administration - Global Business Management (GBM)
- Master of Business Administration - Financial and Management Analytics (FMA)
- Master of Business Administration - Information Systems Management (ISM)
- Master of Business Administration - General Stream (GS)
